TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ryan_Alosio, title = Ryan_Alosio, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ryan_Alosio} }

S.FORM: Ryan Alosio kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Russell Arms, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Ryan Alosio kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 1, Russell Arms, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: rjan alos~ɕio kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, rus~ɕs~ɕell arms~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
